behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names all relevant files (database.ts, auth.ts, context.db.ts, books.tsx, cart.tsx, admin.books.tsx, README.md) and points to remix/data-table as the symbol source and context.ts as the reference for the get() pattern.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the problem (inconsistent pattern, custom db property) and points to remix/data-table exports without stating the exact API (Database symbol, get(Database), context.set(Database, db)).

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests assert on the documented API surface (Database import from remix/data-table, get(Database), context.set(Database,...)) which is the only way to match the existing Session/FormData pattern; alternatives wouldn't satisfy the stated requirement.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests run pnpm typecheck, lint, format, and the bookstore/data-table test suites via subprocess in addition to static grep checks.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover middleware refactor, handler refactor, removal of context.db.ts augmentation, and README documentation updates — matching instruction requirements.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped under section comments (pass_to_pass/static, repo_tests, fail_to_pass/pr_diff, README) with descriptive docstrings.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is a code refactor, not producing structured data.

no_typos.reason: File paths and commands are consistent between instruction and tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names files to inspect at a domain level without pinpointing exact line numbers or buggy statements.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: This is a code refactor task, not an agentmd-edits/config task.
